1.) Tom's Netplay Patch, improved delayed netcode for global connection: http://lunarcast.net/aocf.php You'll download the `Netplay.zip` (password netplay) and make an exception on the game's folder from Windows Defender or whatever anti-virus you have. To connect quickly, please use ProxyPunch (PP): https://github.com/delthas/proxypunch/releases/latest , know that these matches CAN'T be spectated but these will give the LEAST amount of lag compared to other forms of connecting without being able to host (Port Forward being the LEAST amount of lag and the best way to spectate as well)

Please know that this will give the MOST amount of lag out of all the options, but it will allow players to be spectated compared to not being able to thanks to ProxyPunch (PP)
